examples: Cellulosic ethanol would address many of these problems.
But cellulosic biofuel has so far failed, on an epic scale, to deliver.
For one thing, even if cellulosic ethanol can be made viable, that feat remains years away.
Much-touted cellulosic ethanol from plant waste remains a long way from commercial production reality.
"To get the big numbers, you're going to have to bring on cellulosic ethanol, " he says.
